name: Skip Intro
description: Shows a 'Skip Intro' button during the opening credits window. Click it to jump past the intro.
author: HephaestWatch

variables.label: Seconds to skip
variables.description: How many seconds the Skip Intro button jumps forward.

variables.label: Show button after (seconds)
variables.description: Show the button only after this many seconds into playback.

variables.label: Hide button after (minutes)
variables.description: Hide the button after this many minutes into playback.
